reforms.description: The Federal 1975 Budget introduced a tax reform that lowered income tax rates and increased tax-free allowances, significantly boosting private household disposable income and reducing the tax burden on enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The tax reform is expected to increase disposable income, thereby stimulating consumer spending and economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax reform became effective on 1st January 1975.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in fiscal policy aimed at stimulating economic activity through tax reductions, impacting a wide range of households and enterprises.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal 1975 Budget will again provide a strong stimulus to the economy, mainly as a result of the tax reform which became effective on 1st January.
